{{Infobox character
| name = Chaim
| parents = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Moseth}}
| children = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orlina]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|advisor to the Mayor, leader, figure of authority}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Myrians]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|advisor}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Myria]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

''See also: [[Chaim Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Chaim is a man who has endured significant trauma and hardship at the hands of captors. He was once part of a family that suffered during a violent event where their home was destroyed. Having experienced captivity involving starvation and forced labor, he harbors intense resentment toward those who harmed his people. This anger is directed specifically at a [[Damascan]] family currently located within [[Simon]]'s territory, whom Chaim views as targets for retribution. Despite his physical exhaustion and diminished strength, he remains a vocal and forceful presence. While he expresses a fierce, almost rabid desire for vengeance, he also shows a paternal side toward [[Simon]] and has agreed to follow [[Simon]]'s leadership, provided his group is not abandoned.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A large man and the son of Moseth, Chaim served as an advisor to the Mayor and acted as a figure of authority for the Myrian people. As the father of [[Orlina]], he was among the villagers from [[Myria]] who were taken captive with his hands bound in hemp rope. During his imprisonment, he poked his face into the canvas to inquire about the nature of the Gate. Ultimately, Chaim managed to escape his captivity.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] is a large man and an advisor to the Mayor.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c3">''House of Blades'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] is the Mayor’s advisor.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] is [[Orlina]]'s father.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] is the son of Moseth and was an advisor to the Mayor.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] is a captive whose hands were tied with hemp rope.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] is a person from [[Myria]] who stands among the villagers.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] poked his face into the canvas and asked what the Gate was.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] is a leader or figure of authority for the [[Myrians]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaim]] is a Myrian who escaped captivity.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Chaim]] is a person [[Leah]] knows.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Chaim poked his face in, his eyes growing huge as he took in the Gate. “What is that?” he asked.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Alin,” Chaim called, “we’re ready. They took us captive, but we escaped.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Myrians]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
